patterns.pattern: ^(\w+) thrusts? forward with .+, piercing through (.+)'s shield\.$
^(You) cower before (.+), causing \w+ to recklessly attack you with no regard for\w+ own safety\.$
^(\w+) cowers before (.+), causing \w+ to recklessly attack with no regard for \w+ own safety\.$
^(\w+) gives out a chittering call and a small squirrel suddenly appears and leaps at (.+), biting \w+ and continuing to scamper around \w+\.$
^(You) give out a chittering call and a small squirrel appears and leaps at (.+) and bites \w+, continuing to scamper around \w+\.$
^(\w+) leaps high into the air, .+ held high above \w+ head as \w+ lands on top of (.+) and skewers \w+ with the weapon\.$
^(You) leap high into the air, .+ held high above your head as you land on top of (.+), skewering \w+ with your weapon\.$
^(You) utter a loud, buzzing call, and a swarm of wasps rushes in but they do little more than annoy (.+)\.$
^(\w+) utters a loud, buzzing call and a swarm of wasps rushes in but they do little more than annoy (.+)\.$
^(\w+) utters a loud, buzzing call and a swarm of wasps rushes in, swarming over (.+)'s slowed form and stinging \w+ flesh\.$
^(You) utter a loud, buzzing call and a swarm of wasps rushes in, swarming over (.+)'s slowed form and stinging \w+ flesh\.$
^(\w+) utters a loud, buzzing call and a swarm of wasps rushes in, swarming over (.+)'s form and stinging \w+slow\-healing flesh\.$
^(You) utter a loud, buzzing call and a swarm of wasps rushes in, swarming over (.+)'s form and stinging \w+ slow\-healing flesh\.$
^Making soothing noises, (\w+) carefully approaches (.+), temporarily charming \w+\.$
^Making soothing noises, (you) carefully approach (.+), assuring \w+ that you are afriend and urging \w+ to fight for you\.$
^(You) spring forwards onto (.+), and maul \w+ viciously\.$
^(\w+) leaps forwards onto (.+) and mauls \w+ viciously\.$
